rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraised value exemptions. Educ. Code §12.1161 governs charter revocation and state fund eligibility—unrelated subject matter, no conflict.
quote: Sec. 12.1161. EFFECT OF REVOCATION, DENIAL OF RENEWAL, OR SURRENDER OF CHARTER.
_note: No conflict; rule_text addresses charter school revocation, not property tax exemptions.
